hardBlockers.message: Page does not expose stable visible text, stable action labels, or component anchors for assertions.
Page does not expose a usable action path for the current generated interaction strategy.
Page does not expose a stable post-action outcome for the current generated interaction strategy.
Page is in the known flaky page denylist and needs manual review before further auto-generation.
Spec targets a page outside <webTestRoot>. Delete the spec or recreate the page under the configured webTestRoot before continuing.
